community_notes.excerpt: Daily mission discussion describes Freeze and defend both robots as a Pinnacle mission where the Freeze Tank has 1 HP and 4 move; commenters emphasize freezing one robot, baiting robot attacks onto mechs, and using the Freeze Tank to freeze a city when it cannot freeze a robot.

Community discussion for this mission notes that laser bots can be baited into targeting multiple player-side units, including the Freeze Tank, and that preserving the robot objective may sometimes justify accepting minor city damage depending on priorities.
Allied Units reference lists Freeze Tank as an active allied unit with 1 health, 4 move, and Freeze Cannon, which shoots a projectile that freezes targets.
